headline: Jobs, Earnings, and Iran War Will Weigh on Markets Ahead of Fed Change
summary: Cue the violins, because after Jerome Powell’s swan song Fed rate meeting, it’s his final two weeks in the hot seat.  Powell’s term as Chairman of the Federal Reserve ends on May 15, with Kevin Warsh’s Senate vote to confirm him as successor taking place as early as May 11.  While Powell is set to bow out in charge of the Fed, he has said he would stay on as a governor.

content.title: Jobs, Earnings, and Iran War Will Weigh on Markets Ahead of Fed Change
content.summary: Cue the violins, because after Jerome Powell’s swan song Fed rate meeting, it’s his final two weeks in the hot seat.  Powell’s term as Chairman of the Federal Reserve ends on May 15, with Kevin Warsh’s Senate vote to confirm him as successor taking place as early as May 11.  While Powell is set to bow out in charge of the Fed, he has said he would stay on as a governor.

headline: Parks Associates: Paramount-WBD (Warner Bros. Discovery) Deal Signals New Era of Streaming Scale
summary: Parks Associates' latest streaming video research highlights that Paramount's acquisition of Warner Bros. Discovery (WBD) would extend the combined company's reach to 57% of all US internet households. This deal would put it on par with the four streaming giants, Netflix,Google,Amazon, and Disney, which each reach nearly 60% of all consumers via their various platforms and services.

content.title: Parks Associates: Paramount-WBD (Warner Bros. Discovery) Deal Signals New Era of Streaming Scale
content.summary: Parks Associates' latest streaming video research highlights that Paramount's acquisition of Warner Bros. Discovery (WBD) would extend the combined company's reach to 57% of all US internet households. This deal would put it on par with the four streaming giants, Netflix,Google,Amazon, and Disney, which each reach nearly 60% of all consumers via their various platforms and services.

headline: Market Greed Is Back: Oil and the Hormuz Strait Didn’t Get the Memo.
summary: The CBOE Volatility Index (CBOE:VIX) is up 2.2% today to hover just above 17, snapping back from Friday’s close as renewed Middle East tensions and crude price spikes reintroduce risk premium into options markets. The bounce comes one trading session after the S&P 500 set a fresh all-time high of 7,230, capping the index’s best ... Market Greed Is Back: Oil and the Hormuz Strait Didn’t Get the Memo.

headline: How Avatar Lawsuit And New Disney Tie-ins At Walt Disney (DIS) Has Changed Its Investment Story
summary: In April 2026, former 3-D animator Eric Ryder filed an amended US copyright lawsuit against James Cameron, Lightstorm Entertainment, and several Walt Disney subsidiaries, alleging extensive unauthorized use of his KRZ story across the entire Avatar franchise and seeking more than US$1.00 billion in damages plus injunctive relief. Separately, WK Kellogg Co announced the return of cereal-box toys through a tie-up with The Walt Disney Studios for Toy Story 5, underscoring how Disney’s...
